topic: A close-up of a Newton's Cradle in motion on a desk, macro view.

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Macro close-up on Newton's cradle beads, side view; shallow DOF; slight sway.
Scene 2 — Motion (2-5s): Tight follow on the struck bead; arc tracking as other beads respond; desk surface blurred in background.
Scene 3 — Rest (5-8s): Wide macro frame reveals cradle settling; beads align and pause at rest, motion ceases.
parsed_generation.narration: A macro view reveals the cradle's precise geometry and frictionless rhythm. You feel momentum transfer and energy conservation in each bead collision. The shallow depth of field isolates motion at the micro scale, inviting closer inspection of the arcs.

feedback: Solid topic fidelity and a clear, scene-based prompt structure that matches the reference style. To improve, add explicit camera and lighting cues (e.g., lens focal length, aperture, lighting angle) to boost visual richness, and enrich narration with more tactile details of the collisions while keeping the cradle as the single subject.
strengths: Clear, action-first scene sequencing with time stamps.
Maintains a single-subject focus on the Newton's cradle.
fixes: Specify camera parameters and lighting to enhance macro visuals (f-stop, focal length, light direction).
Diversify narration with sensory details of each collision (sound, impact feel) without introducing extra subjects.
